items.title: L1 vs L2 unit balls in the plane
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  origin(("0")) --> l2point(("L2: circle boundary"))
  origin --> l1point{{"L1: diamond boundary"}}
  l2point --> noteL2["||x||₂ = 1"]
  l1point --> noteL1["|x₁|+|x₂| = 1"]
items.caption: In R², the L2 unit ball is a circle; the L1 unit ball is a diamond (rotated square). Points on each boundary have norm 1 under the respective norm.

items.title: Triangle inequality intuition
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  O(("0")) -->|"u"| A(("u"))
  A -->|"v"| B(("u+v"))
  O -.->|"shorter or equal"| B
items.caption: The direct path from 0 to u+v cannot be longer than traveling via u—the triangle inequality in geometric form.
